programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc: Duke reads the story of Allie and Noah, two lovers who were separated by fate, to Ms Hamilton, an old woman who suffers from dementia, on a daily basis out of his notebook.

programme.title: Safe Haven
programme.desc: A mysterious young woman arrives in Southport, North Carolina, and falls in love with a widowed store owner. However, her dark past intrudes in her new life.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Sophie secretly invites three of her mother's former lovers to her upcoming wedding. In doing so, she hopes to discover the true identity of her biological father before the ceremony takes place.

programme.title: Yes Man
programme.desc: Carl, a lonely man with low self-esteem, participates in a self-help programme that challenges him to say yes to everything in life for an entire year.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Gene is a smartphone emoji who can show a wide range of emotions instead of just one. When he makes a mistake that threatens his life, he sets out to become normal like his fellow emojis.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: Devastated by his wife's request for a divorce, middle-aged Cal ventures out to meet women according to his new friend's advice.

programme.title: The Great Dictator
programme.desc: After suffering from memory loss, a soldier returns to his former profession as a barber and attempts to escape persecution by the military forces.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: A neurotic thirty-something woman resolves to finally take control of her life once and for all, while looking for h love.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo is hired to track down his ex-wife, Nicole, for skipping bail. Subsequently, a routine retrieval turns into a deadly game of cat and mouse, forcing them both to go on the run together.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo is offered the chance to cut short his prison tenure by going on a secret mission for the US government deep into the jungles of Vietnam and locating American POWs.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: An Egyptologist is caught in the crossfire when a sinister cult resurrects the mummified body of an evil priest. The group then aims to use his ancient power to defeat a legendary warrior.

programme.title: Making Pandas
programme.desc: The iconic Giant Panda is on the brink. With only 1600 left in the wild, pressures on their natural habitat and a notoriously small window for reproduction are edging them towards extinction - fast.Over 1 year, we go behind-the-scenes and follow the incredible work of a dedicated group of zookeepers and vets as they race to get Singapore's famed couple… to fall in ‘love'. The team from the River S

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In China, Rooftop and Catfish continue their East Asian adventures. As if the leeches in Indonesia weren't enough, the bikers move on to bee sting therapy in China, strengthen their stomachs with some grasshoppers and mice wine, and attempt to transport hundreds of pounds of fish on nothing but a bike and sheer will power. The duo also undergo a hike of Chinese mountain Hua Shan, electro acupunctu

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: Off to Vietnam next, Rooftop and Catfish embark on what may be their most dangerous visit yet. The BMX bikers start their journey relatively tame with a shot of snake blood. However, things quickly escalate from there with the most intense game of frogger they've ever played in the Vietnamese streets. From a hospital visit and racing through the Vietcong tunnels to trying fertilized baby bird eggs

programme.title: Feral
programme.desc: If you asked experts what the most prevalent predator species in the United States is, without hesitation, the answer would be the Burmese pythons in the Florida Everglades. Growing up to 26-feet long and weighing as much as 200 pounds, the Burmese python has completely altered the ecosystem of the Everglades by eliminating over 99% of the native mammal population. To save the 'Glades, the hunter

programme.title: Feral
programme.desc: A once sought-after pet, the green iguanas escaped their terrariums in the 60's and found the Florida eco-system to be a much more hospitable environment to call home. Free to roam the canals, parks, and suburban neighborhoods, these pets-gone-feral have exploded in both size and population, causing hundreds of millions of dollars of damage a year in Florida. programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-5
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.title: ADA DUA CINTA EPS 14
programme.desc: It tells the story of two girls, Mecca (who comes from humble circumstances) and Medina (who is wealthy), who are connected through Ayu—Mecca's biological mother—who adopted Medina. Conflict arises when they both fall in love with the same man, creating an emotional romantic drama that tugs at the heartstrings.

programme.desc: Ayuna, a beauty vlogger and model, finishes a shoot and is picked up by her younger sister, Bella. Bella then asks Ayuna to have one last race on a deserted road as her farewell to the racing world, a request that Ayuna agrees to with a hea

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 74
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho

programme.title: KARENA AKU SAYANG 19
programme.desc: Kenzie is a man who has experienced countless traumatic events in his past. These experiences have shaped him into a perfectionist who often makes things difficult for those around him. One of them is Zara, his personal assistant, who constantly tries to cheer him up as he frequently experiences mood swings in various situations.

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 48
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. programme.desc: Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very odd x-ray from Nurse Bingo; it seems he has a cat in his tummy, leaving Doctor Bluey no choice but to operate immediately.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Chloe tries to teach her dad to improvise and play Bluey's game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand or enjoy, until they both realize they can play it their own way.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series
programme.desc: After discovering he is not a real doctor, Mavis and the gang teach Dr. Gilman everything they know about medicine.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series
programme.desc: When the gang starts making too much noise, the Sandman can't get any sleep, so he puts the hotel under a spell, trapping the gang in a dream world.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series
programme.desc: After learning the Roadkill Grill will close, Mavis and uncle Gene go on one last road trip together.

programme.title: Make It Pop
programme.desc: Valerie is assigned as Jodi's tutor; Jared enlists Corki's help to turn Valerie into a better actress; Sun Hi's plan backfires.

programme.title: The Prestige
programme.desc: Two friends and fellow magicians become bitter enemies after a sudden tragedy. However, as they devote themselves to this rivalry, they make sacrifices that bring them fame and terrible consequences.

programme.title: The Great Gatsby
programme.desc: Nick Carraway arrives in New York in 1922. Chasing his own American Dream, Nick is drawn into the captivating world of the super-rich, their illusions, loves and deceits.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: Rick, a fading actor, and Cliff, his stunt double, struggle to find relevant work in Hollywood and go through various twists and turns in order to restart their careers.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Somali pirates attack the Maersk Alabama, a container ship, while it is on its course to Kenya. Richard Phillips, the captain of the ship, uses his wits to negotiate with them to save his crew.

programme.title: Elvis
programme.desc: Whilst on a mission to transform the mainstream rock and roll culture of the USA, singer Elvis Presley uses his fame to highlight racism within the country.

programme.title: The Pianist
programme.desc: A Jewish musician's privileged lifestyle comes to an end with the Nazi invasion of Germany, following which he must endure the horrors of the Holocaust.

programme.title: King Richard
programme.desc: Equipped with an elaborate plan, clear vision and unwavering determination, Richard Williams, a sports coach, encourages his daughters, Venus and Serena, to become tennis champions.

programme.title: AstroBiz Mencari Kedai Lejen: Rezeky Tomyam
programme.desc: Mencari Kedai Lejen ialah siri dokumentari yang mengangkat kisah pemilik F&B tempatan. Dua restoran, dua menu berlainan, berkongsi satu legasi kisah Aunty T's serta Rezeky Tomyam, dedikasi dan pengorbanan.
